mapper.select:
SELECT h.id, c.real_name as customer_name, u.avatar_url as avatar, house.project_name as house_title, CONCAT('/api/profile/', (SELECT file_key FROM tb_house_image WHERE house_id = house.id AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1)) as house_cover, CASE WHEN house.house_type = 1 THEN '新房' WHEN house.house_type = 2 THEN '二手房' ELSE '其他' END as house_type, house.house_no, house.layout, house.area, CONCAT(house.floor, '层/共', house.total_floor, '层') as floor_label, house.orientation, house.decoration, ROUND(house.unit_price_fen / 100, 0) as unit_price, ROUND(house.total_price_fen / 1000000, 2) as total_price, ROUND(house.rent_price_fen / 100, 0) as rent_price, h.action_type, h.duration, h.interest_level, h.content, h.view_time FROM tb_user_browse_history h JOIN tb_app_user u ON h.app_user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_customer c ON u.id = c.app_user_id LEFT JOIN tb_house house ON h.resource_id = house.id AND h.resource_type = 1
AND (c.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%'))
AND h.action_type = #{actionType}
ORDER BY h.view_time DESC
